subject: [RFCv2 PATCH 2/6] efi/unaccepted: Set unaccepted bits for all hotplug memory

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau
reviews.summary: Identified a potential out-of-bounds issue in handling SRAT ranges. Suggested adding a check to ignore small ranges less than unit_size.

reviews.author: Zhenzhong Duan
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the potential issue and suggested a fix by adding a check to ignore small ranges less than unit_size.

2026-06-24.patch_summary: Patch addresses potential out-of-bounds issue in handling SRAT ranges.
